## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Matt Ressler for SEO and GEO Lead role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Matt has extensive enterprise SEO experience, including award-winning campaigns for major financial clients](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [GrowthX is rapidly growing, onboarding 2 new clients per week with an 8-week strategy sprint model](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [The role would involve overseeing SEO/AEO strategy, documentation, and potentially building out a team](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [GrowthX is focused on innovating in the AEO space and scaling their operations efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

## Topics

### Matt's Background and Experience

  - [Currently at Omnicom agency working on enterprise SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Led award-winning campaign for City National Bank, growing mortgage contacts from 200 to 1100 annually](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Experience across finance, retail, and healthcare verticals](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Developed AEO (AI-Enhanced Optimization) strategies at current agency](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### GrowthX's Business Model and Growth

  - [Onboarding 2 new clients per week, with high demand](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint model to align on objectives before 12-month engagements](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
  - [Shifted from 3-month to 14-month contracts to show repeatability and appeal to investors](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)
  - [Focused on balancing growth speed with quality of service](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)

### AEO/GEO Strategy and Innovation

  - [GrowthX sees opportunity to lead in AEO space, connecting visibility data to actionable strategies](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Using tools like MarketBrew for embedding analysis to optimize content for AI citations](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Emphasis on persona-focused content that reduces friction for users across search and AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

### Role Expectations and Company Vision

  - [Primary goal is to alleviate Jason's (likely CEO/founder) duties in SEO/AEO realm](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
  - [Long-term vision for role holder to potentially oversee the department as company grows](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
  - [Company's rapid pace of change makes long-term planning challenging; 6-month outlook more realistic](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)

### Team and Process Documentation

  - [Matt emphasizes importance of templatizing processes for team efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [GrowthX acknowledges need for better documentation and keeping resources up-to-date](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Challenge of balancing documentation with rapid industry changes in AI/search](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to circle back with internal team about Matt's interview](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=2583.0)
  - [Team expected to reach out to Matt soon with next steps in hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=2583.0)
  - [Matt heading on vacation to Banff, timing for follow-up may be affected](https://fathom.video/share/7-p9Zvr2eHqDpSdoxB4i7GxWazAESaFP?tab=summary&timestamp=2565.0)
